form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Latest effort finished last over 278m at Launceston beaten 13 lengths (16.92) behind Adhana Kevin in a Grade 5 on April 6. More than capable and well placed to find her best form.

form.formComment: Won two starts back at this track over 340m in 19.87. Followed that up with a minor placing over 340m at this track at Restricted WIN a week ago. Comes through a solid form race. Expected to run well.

form.formComment: Most recent effort finished 6th on March 24 over 340m at this track behind Jungle Boogie beaten 11 lengths (20.21) in a Grade 4/5. Major threat on best form.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but was in the minors two on end prior to that, the most recent when second (26.68) at big odds over 461m at this track. Tough draw to overcome and looks safely held.
